news-global-econ.title: Iowa news anchor quits live on-air in emotional plea for facts over 'sanitized news'
news-global-econ.description: Local news anchor Dustin Nolan tearfully announced he was leaving KWQC TV6 during a live broadcast on Friday after spending about four years on the station.

news-global-econ.description:

news-global-econ.description: Former Rep. Brad Wenstrup, R-Ohio, reacts to new documents on Anthony Fauci's alleged role in gain-of-function research and alleged cover-up.

news-global-soc.title: Albanian protesters flood streets demanding prime minister's resignation amid corruption accusations
news-global-soc.description: Albania protests target Socialist PM Edi Rama over corruption allegations, not Kushner investments, former ambassador tells Fox News Digital.

news-global-soc.title: Manhunt Continues, Reward Offered for Suspected Kansas City Shooter
news-global-soc.description:
A manhunt continues for 22-year-old Oscar Sanchez-Munoz, and the FBI is offering a $25,000 reward for information leading to his arrest.

news-global-soc.title: EXCLUSIVE: Meet the man Israel chose to be its first-ever ambassador to the Christian world
news-global-soc.description: Ambassador George Deek explains the mission behind his new role as special envoy to the Christian world and Israel's efforts to strengthen the Judeo-Christian bond.

news-global-soc.title: Man Allegedly Crashes SUV Into Home, Gets Shot Dead by Resident
news-global-soc.description:
